features.name: darkdm-mediafire bash (working)
features.description: Script bash funcional para descargar desde MediaFire con --get-link, --password, fix gzip, timeout 1h, y preservación del RAR original
features.evidence: --get-link probado con URL real: https://download1350.mediafire.com/.../OOOOOOOOOOO.rar, init.sh build pasa

features.name: Native Rust CLI Spec (openspec)
features.description: Spec de 2000+ líneas con 8 patrones de diseño: Pipeline, State Machine, Plugin Registry, Event System, Retry Backoff, Segmented Download, Queue Manager, File Layout. Cubre pros/cons, 10 casos de uso, manejo de errores, códigos de salida, YouTube plugin.
features.evidence: openspec/changes/native-cli/ creado con design.md (2013 líneas), tasks.md, proposal.md, .openspec.yaml. README actualizado.

features.name: Native Rust CLI Implementation
features.description: Implementar el engine Rust: reqwest download, pipeline stages, state machine, page analyzer, plugins (MediaFire, YouTube), multi-hilo, resume, extractor, logging system, y binario darkdm con clap. Queue manager pendiente para feat-004.
features.evidence: ✅ Core engine: piece.rs, probe.rs, transacted_io.rs, piece_manager.rs, download_engine.rs, piece_worker.rs, progress.rs, disk_space.rs, auto_rename.rs, content_type.rs, page_analyzer.rs, hls_handler.rs, logger.rs. ✅ Plugins: MediaFireExtractor, YouTubeExtractor (yt-dlp backend), ExtractorRegistry. ✅ CLI darkdm con clap (descargar, info, logs). ✅ Logging: tracing + tracing-subscriber, console (colored) + file (rotating daily, 5 max), --verbose flag, RUST_LOG support, darkdm logs command. ✅ Progress bar ILoveCandy (Pac-Man animado). ✅ Multi-threaded download (8 workers, dynamic piece-splitting). ✅ Disk space check (libc::statvfs). ✅ Auto-rename (file.mp4 → file (1).mp4). ✅ HLS handler (ffmpeg). ✅ 38 tests pasando (+2 logging tests). ✅ Dependencies: reqwest, tokio, async-trait, futures-util, url, urlencoding, clap, libc, scraper, tracing, tracing-subscriber, tracing-appender, chrono. ✅ Verificado: YouTube (https://youtu.be/nK--xjRiwPY → 152MB MP4), Blender demo (262.8MB ZIP multi-threaded @ 10 MiB/s), logging to ~/.local/share/darkdm/darkdm.YYYY-MM-DD.log. ✅ Docs: docs/LOGGING.md. ./init.sh passes.

features.name: Tauri Integration
features.description: Engine compartido entre CLI y Tauri app. Eventos de progreso al frontend, comando Tauri download que usa el mismo engine

features.name: Cleanup and Handoff
features.description: Record verification evidence, update progress.md, and leave a clear next-session path

features.name: Netflix CDN Support
features.description: NetflixExtractor plugin + documentación. Soporta URLs CDN directas (nflxso.net, nflxvideo.net) y URLs de página Netflix con cookies. Rama: feat/netflix.
features.evidence: ✅ NetflixExtractor: detecta nflxso.net/nflxvideo.net/nflxext.com + netflix.com/watch/*. ✅ Direct CDN URL funciona sin modificaciones al engine (probe + download multi-threaded verificado: 9.17MB @ 10.1 MiB/s). ✅ 5 tests Netflix (detect, reject, filename, extract CDN). ✅ 43 tests total pasando. ✅ docs/NETFLIX.md completo. ✅ Rama feat/netflix creada desde main. ⚠️ Pendiente: --cookies flag, merge a main tras testing.
